reviews.comment:
Esta ubicada a cuatrocientos metros de la Plaza Independencia no está en una buena ubicación ya que hay mucho tránsito en el área que dificulta tanto la entrada como la salida del servicio

(Translated by Google)
Located four hundred meters from Independence Square, it is not in a good location as there is a lot of traffic in the area which makes it difficult to enter and exit the service.

reviews.comment:
Es una YPF del Automóvil Club Argwntino. Esta ubicada en una esquina  de mucho tránsito que solo se puede ingresar por una calle.  La atención en Playa es excelente

(Translated by Google)
It's a YPF owned by the Argentine Automobile Club. It's located on a busy corner with only one street to enter. The service in Playa is excellent.
